subcodes.first_line: O my beloved, my companion and my intimate friend! Various and diverse letters have been received, and their contents are of the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا حبیبی و مونسی و انیسی مسطورات مختلفه متنوعه وارد و مضامین در نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @consolation and comfort, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @humility; meekness; lowliness
